tools.name: create_subscription
tools.summary: Create a Mercado Pago recurring subscription. Returns the init_point URL where the customer must complete the FIRST payment with their card and CVV.

envVars: MP_ACCESS_TOKEN (TEST- for sandbox, APP_USR- for prod)
constraints.costPerCall: $0 (creation is free; merchant pays per-transaction fee on auto-charges)

output.init_point_url: string (URL the buyer must visit to complete first payment)

whenToUse: User asks to subscribe a customer to a recurring plan
whenNotToUse: User wants a one-off payment — Subscriptions API is recurring-only
User wants to charge a specific amount that varies per cycle — fix the amount or use a different MP product

errorPatterns.meaning: App passed a non-HTTPS backUrl (e.g., http://localhost). MP rejects all non-HTTPS even in sandbox.
errorPatterns.recovery: App misconfiguration — surface to user as 'application error', not a user-fixable problem.

errorPatterns.meaning: customer_email equals the seller account's email. MP refuses self-payment on subscriptions.
errorPatterns.recovery: Tell user to use a different buyer email.

errorPatterns.meaning: Misleading MP error 'Cannot operate between different countries'. Real cause: seller token is real-account-in-test-mode but buyer email is a test_user_*@testuser.com AFIP test user.
errorPatterns.recovery: Use a real consumer email as the buyer.

tools.name: get_subscription_status
tools.summary: Check the current status of a Mercado Pago subscription. Use to confirm the customer completed the first payment or to inspect next charge date.
whenToUse: User asks if a customer paid
User asks when the next charge will happen
Need to verify subscription is still authorized after potential webhook events
whenNotToUse: You haven't created a subscription yet — no ID to query

tools.name: cancel_subscription
tools.summary: Cancel an active Mercado Pago subscription. IRREVERSIBLE — confirm with user before calling.
whenToUse: User explicitly confirms they want to cancel a subscription
whenNotToUse: User asked to pause temporarily — use pause_subscription instead
Without explicit user confirmation — this tool's description triggers a confirm-before-call turn in Claude Sonnet 4.6+; honor that
tools.irreversibility: MP cannot reactivate a cancelled subscription. Create a fresh one to resume billing.

tools.name: pause_subscription
tools.summary: Pause an authorized subscription. Charges stop until resumed.
whenToUse: User wants to pause billing temporarily but keep the subscription
whenNotToUse: Subscription is in pending status (not yet authorized) — pause only works on authorized subs

tools.name: resume_subscription
tools.summary: Resume a paused subscription. Charges resume on next scheduled date.
whenToUse: User wants to reactivate a previously-paused subscription
whenNotToUse: Subscription is cancelled — MP doesn't allow resuming cancelled subs (throws MercadoPagoAuthorizeForbiddenError). Create a new subscription instead.

tools.name: create_payment
tools.summary: Create a one-off payment. Two flows: (a) with `token` from MP frontend SDK for cards, (b) without token for account_money/rapipago/pagofacil.
sideEffects: May charge buyer if account_money/card token

constraints.costPerCall: $0 (creation); MP charges merchant per-transaction fee on success

output.status_detail: string (see AGENTS.md for recovery actions per value)

whenToUse: User wants to charge a specific payer email with account_money / Rapipago / Pago Fácil
User has a valid card token from MP frontend SDK and wants server-side charge
whenNotToUse: User pasted raw card data — REFUSE (PCI scope violation). Use create_payment_preference instead.
User wants recurring billing — use create_subscription

tools.name: get_payment
tools.summary: Fetch a single payment by ID. Use after webhook to confirm status.
tools.output: Same shape as create_payment output, plus net_received

tools.name: search_payments
tools.summary: Search payments by external_reference / status / date range. Paginated.

output.payments: array of {payment_id, status, amount, currency, payer_email, external_reference, date_created}

tools.name: cancel_payment
tools.summary: Cancel a pending or in_process payment. For approved use refund_payment.
sideEffects: Mutates payment status to cancelled on MP

tools.name: capture_payment
tools.summary: Capture an authorized credit-card payment created with capture=false. Optional partial amount.
sideEffects: Captures funds; settles to seller per MP rules

tools.name: refund_payment
tools.summary: Refund an approved payment. Partial (with amount) or full (omit). Auto-idempotent on (payment_id, amount).
sideEffects: Returns funds to buyer; debits seller balance
whenToUse: User explicitly requests a refund (full or partial)
whenNotToUse: Payment is still pending/in_process — use cancel_payment instead
More than 30 days since payment — MP refund window expired
tools.irreversibility: Refund is irreversible. Confirm amount and payment_id with user first.

tools.name: list_refunds
tools.summary: List all refunds for a given payment.

tools.name: create_payment_preference
tools.summary: Create a Checkout Pro hosted payment URL. RECOMMENDED for agent flows where you don't have a card token — buyer enters card on MP-hosted form (no PCI scope needed).

input.items: array of {title, quantity, unit_price, description?, picture_url?}

output.sandbox_init_point_url: string (sandbox — use this if your token is TEST-)

whenToUse: User wants to charge a payer over WhatsApp/email/SMS
User says 'cobrale $X a [email]' and you don't have a card token
whenNotToUse: User pasted raw card data — REFUSE (PCI violation)

tools.name: get_payment_preference
tools.summary: Fetch a Checkout Pro preference by ID.
tools.output: Same as create_payment_preference output, plus items array

tools.name: create_customer
tools.summary: Create or upsert an MP customer for saving cards / repeat charges. Idempotent on email.
sideEffects: Creates customer record on MP if not exists

tools.name: find_customer_by_email
tools.summary: Find existing customer by email. Returns null if not found.

tools.name: list_customer_cards
tools.summary: List saved cards for a customer.

output.cards: array of {card_id, last_four_digits, expiration_month, expiration_year, payment_method, payment_method_name}

tools.name: delete_customer_card
tools.summary: Delete a saved card. Irreversible.

tools.name: list_payment_methods
tools.summary: List all payment methods enabled for the seller's MP account (visa, master, naranja, naranja_x, cabal, account_money, rapipago, pagofacil, etc.).

output.methods: array of {id, name, payment_type, status, min_amount, max_amount}

tools.name: calculate_installments
tools.summary: Calculate cuotas options for an amount. THE killer AR feature. Returns recommended_message strings ('12 cuotas sin interés de $X') ready to surface VERBATIM to the user.

input.bin: string? 6-8 chars (first digits of card for issuer-specific promos)

output.offers: array of {payment_method_id, payment_type_id, issuer_name, options: [{installments, installment_amount, total_amount, installment_rate, recommended_message}]}

whenToUse: User asks 'cuántas cuotas tiene esta tarjeta?'
Before create_payment with installments > 1 to validate available options
Show options BEFORE the user picks (AR transparency regulation E 51/2017 compliance)

tools.name: get_account_info
tools.summary: Get info about the MP account that owns the access token (site_id, country, user_type).

tools.name: handle_webhook
tools.summary: v0.5 — Verify HMAC + parse + auto-fetch webhook in ONE call. THE recommended way to handle MP webhooks in production.
sideEffects: Fetches Payment / Preapproval AS the configured client when auto_fetch=true

input.raw_body: string (raw JSON body — do NOT re-stringify)

whenToUse: Always in webhook endpoints — REJECT (HTTP 401) when verified=false

tools.name: oauth_authorize_url
tools.summary: v0.5 — Build the URL the SELLER visits to authorize your marketplace app. Pure function.

input.redirect_uri: string (must be whitelisted in MP dev panel)
input.state: string (CSRF token, bind to user session)

tools.name: oauth_exchange_code
tools.summary: v0.5 — Exchange the OAuth code (from redirect) for OAuthToken { access_token, refresh_token, user_id, expires_in }.

input.redirect_uri: string (must EXACTLY match the URL used in oauth_authorize_url)

tools.name: oauth_refresh_token
tools.summary: v0.5 — Refresh a per-seller access_token. Always persist the new refresh_token (it may rotate).

tools.name: create_order
tools.summary: v0.5 — Create an Order (modern API). Supports manual capture (auth-only) and marketplace splits.

tools.name: get_order
tools.summary: v0.5 — Fetch an Order by id.

tools.name: update_order
tools.summary: v0.5 — Patch an Order (external_reference, total_amount).

tools.name: capture_order
tools.summary: v0.5 — Capture an authorized Order (capture_mode='manual'). Optional partial-capture amount.

tools.name: cancel_order
tools.summary: v0.5 — Cancel a non-captured Order. Releases auth-holds. For captured orders, use refund_payment.
